mainEntity.name: What are the penalties for non-compliance with ROC filings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Late filing attracts additional fees of Rs 100 per day per form with no upper cap. Companies with 3+ years of non-filing face strike-off proceedings under Section 248. Directors of defaulting companies face disqualification under Section 164(2) — barring them from being appointed as director in any company for 5 years.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle compliance for companies registered in any state?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. MCA filings are done through a centralised online portal. We handle compliance for companies registered with any ROC — Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, and others. Our physical offices in 3 cities support in-person needs.

mainEntity.name: What is included in your annual ROC compliance package?

acceptedAnswer.text: Complete annual filing (AOC-4, MGT-7, DIR-3 KYC, ADT-1), all board meeting and AGM facilitation (notices, minutes, resolutions), statutory register maintenance, and compliance monitoring with advance alerts. Event-based filings are available as add-ons.
